name: Region Sjælland (Region Zealand)

colors.symbolism: the light blue of Region Sjælland's corporate identity, evoking the seas surrounding the island of Zealand
the regional logo of stylised circles and the wordmark 'Region Sjælland'

description: A light blue field charged with a white scattered constellation of circles forming the Region Sjælland mark, beside the white wordmark 'Region Sjælland'.
history: Region Sjælland was established on 1 January 2007 by the Danish Local Government Reform (Strukturreformen). The flag uses the region's official light-blue corporate identity.

features.role: Region Sjælland symbol of grouped circles
features.symbolism: the constellation of circles in the regional logo, representing the islands of Zealand and the constituent municipalities of the region
